plan.caption:
Four cards. One unbroken illustration. That is the design intention behind this Akira Egawa panorama from Crown Zenith Galarian Gallery, where Origin Forme Palkia VSTAR, Arceus VSTAR, Origin Forme Dialga VSTAR, and Giratina VSTAR each hold a quarter of the same continuous scene. Lay them side by side and the sky, space, and dimension bleed across every border without interruption.

The verified market numbers on these four tell the full story. Palkia VSTAR sits at $144, Dialga VSTAR at $148, Arceus VSTAR at $244, and Giratina VSTAR leads the set at $432. Full panorama value: $968. Giratina carrying nearly half of that total on its own is worth noting for anyone tracking this quad as an investment position.

Pokeev.com pulls live pricing across all four so you can monitor each card individually or watch the combined value move together. Every number above is sourced directly from pokeev.com.

Which of the four do you hold, and are you building toward the complete panorama? Drop your answer below.
